## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Change surface

- [ ] Web application
- [ ] Native Linux application
- [ ] Shared core or adapter interface
- [ ] Project schema, migration or import/export format
- [ ] NES engine, generated source or ROM behavior
- [ ] Documentation/governance only

## Compatibility and decisions

- [ ] No shared contract changes
- [ ] Shared impact is documented for both web and native
- [ ] Compatibility range or migration path is documented
- [ ] Engine version/snapshot workflow completed, if ROM output changed
- [ ] Deliberate parity differences or exceptions have product-owner approval

Decision/ADR link, if required:

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant web tests
- [ ] Relevant native tests
- [ ] Builder/ROM regression tests
- [ ] Cross-target JSON/build contract tests
- [ ] Manual verification described below
- [ ] Not run, with reason described below

Commands and results:

## Review

- [ ] Owning implementation team reviewed
- [ ] Other product team reviewed, if a shared contract changed
- [ ] Product-owner approval requested for shared contracts, product direction,
      compatibility exceptions, security/data/licensing policy or release gates
